Action 3 completed: FIT-79 Mode B spot-check. 21 total fires (16 pre-fix, 5 post-fix). Gate logic: only checks features where current_phase transitions TO complete; skips all others. Pattern confirms correct scope. 5/5 correctly scoped. Verdict: PROMOTE

Seed context confirms chore/seed branch .claude/shared/* changes - correct Mode B trigger. Consistent emission confirmed. Raw rate NOT cited (5-burst anomaly documented). Verdict: PROMOTE with caveat

T7.9.0 verdict: GO. All 5 candidate gates ready for 2026-05-21 promotion. FIT-79 PROMOTE, FIT-80 PROMOTE, FIT-81 PROMOTE, FIT-82 PROMOTE (mechanical), FIT-83 PROMOTE. Per-gate confidence ≥90%. Action 5 backfill recommendation documented (not a blocker).

Cross-referenced 4 risks from project_v7_9_promotion_risks_2026_05_17 memory against PR #392 verdict report + live gate-coverage.jsonl: Risk A (CACHE_HITS drift 6d stale) RESOLVED — verdict confirms 5/5 valid fires 2026-05-11/12, memory was stale. Risk D retracted 2026-05-17. Net: v7.9 GO confirmed; no remaining blockers.

T7.9.0.6 rollback path rehearsal executed in isolated worktree (/tmp/v7-9-rehearsal on chore/v7-9-0-6-rollback-rehearsal-2026-05-18). Simulated forward-flip: edit scripts/check-state-schema.py:132 (BRANCH_ISOLATION_ADVISORY_MODE: True → False) + .githooks/pre-commit header bump. Forward commit: 1s. Rollback via 'git revert HEAD --no-edit': <1s. File state verified restored. Total elapsed <2s vs 300s target (150x under budget). Confirms the reversibility contract from v7.8.5→v8.2 plan §2: enforced rollback <5min is trivially met for these two flip files. Worktree discarded; no push, no merge.

B1 freeze checklist GREEN. PROMOTE decision: BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION (Modes B + C, single ADVISORY_MODE flag at scripts/check-state-schema.py:132) + FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS write-time. Criteria: (1) Coverage emitted — BRANCH_ISO Mode B 18 rows / Mode C 13 rows / FEATURE_CLOSURE 13 rows over 14d, 0 candidates=0 rows; (2) No false positives — all skip_reasons map to legitimate cases (not_infra_commit_level, not_complete_transition, opt_out_false_or_absent); (3) No silent skips; (4) Reversibility — single-line revert. ISOLATION_OPT_OUT_REASON_MISSING already enforced at v7.8.1. Mechanism A coverage + Mechanism C session-attribution + CACHE_HITS_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_DRIFT + Mechanism E merge driver already enforced at v7.8/v7.8.3.
